prestazioni: 3.5L 2GR-FKS V6 engine (308hp stock) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (8psi boost, 450whp on 93 octane) paired with a custom AEM V2 water-methanol injection kit (50/50 mix) to suppress detonation and cool intake temps

Full 3.5-inch Borla Atak cat-back exhaust system with 409 stainless steel construction, mandrel-bent tubing, and dual 5-inch black chrome tips, coupled with a PPE Long Tube Header (1-7/8" primaries) and a custom 3" downpipe with a Vibrant 10360 high-flow catalytic converter (200 cell) for optimized scavenging

SPEC Stage 3+ Clutch Kit (6-pad carbon/copper hybrid disc, billet flywheel, and heavy-duty pressure plate) with a South Bend DMF conversion for the 2GR-FKS, paired with a TREMEC TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (from a Camaro SS) with a QuickTime SFI-certified bellhousing and a Tilton hydraulic throwout bearing
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a 2.5-inch extended wheelbase conversion using custom fabricated control arms and extended axles from a Toyota Hilux (for +30mm track width per side)

OEM+ TRD Pro heritage grille with a custom 3D-printed mesh insert (0.8mm stainless steel, laser-cut) and a Morimoto XB LED headlight conversion (D2S projector retrofit with 5500K bulbs) paired with Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights

Custom bed cage fabricated from 1.75" DOM steel tubing (0.120" wall thickness) with a Rhino Rack Pioneer Platform (2130mm x 1325mm) and a custom aluminum bed cap (from a Toyota Tundra) with a carbon fiber tonneau cover (RetraxPRO XR, matte finish) and a built-in air compressor (ARB Twin)
